name: VTIL_RegisterObjectPool
title: VTIL_RegisterObjectPool
syntax: long VTIL_RegisterObjectPool(dbNode workingSetMaster, char[] objectPoolPath[], char[] versionLabel); // form 1
description: A registered object pool can be loaded via the Load Version command.
For more information see chapter Save Object Pools in VT Storage.

parameters.name: vt
parameters.description: VT simulation node to apply the function
